scripts.mp4:transcode: yarn clean:ff && ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -c:v libx264 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -b:v 4M -maxrate 4M -bufsize 8M -c:a aac -b:a 128k ../ffout/output.mp4
scripts.ffmpeg:test: yarn clean:ff && ffmpeg -hide_banner -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -c:v libx264 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -b:v 1M -maxrate 1M -bufsize 2M -c:a aac -b:a 128k ../ffout/output.mp4 && ffprobe -v error -show_entries format=duration:stream=codec_name -of json ../ffout/output.mp4
scripts.hls:cmaf: shx rm -rf ../ffout/hls && shx mkdir -p ../ffout/hls && ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -map 0:v -map 0:a -c:v libx264 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -b:v 4M -maxrate 4M -bufsize 8M -c:a aac -b:a 128k -f hls -hls_time 2 -hls_segment_type fmp4 -hls_flags independent_segments -master_pl_name master.m3u8 -hls_fmp4_init_filename init.mp4 -hls_segment_filename "../ffout/hls/seg_%03d.m4s" ../ffout/hls/stream.m3u8
scripts.hls:cmaf:win: shx rm -rf ../ffout/hls && shx mkdir -p ../ffout/hls && ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -map 0:v -map 0:a -c:v libx264 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -b:v 4M -maxrate 4M -bufsize 8M -c:a aac -b:a 128k -f hls -hls_time 2 -hls_segment_type fmp4 -hls_flags independent_segments -master_pl_name master.m3u8 -hls_fmp4_init_filename init.mp4 -hls_segment_filename "../ffout/hls/seg_%%03d.m4s" ../ffout/hls/stream.m3u8
scripts.dash:cmaf: shx rm -rf ../ffout/dash && shx mkdir -p ../ffout/dash && ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -map 0:v -map 0:a -c:v libx264 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -b:v 4000k -maxrate 4000k -bufsize 8000k -c:a aac -b:a 128k -f dash -use_template 1 -use_timeline 0 -init_seg_name init-\$RepresentationID\$.mp4 -media_seg_name chunk-\$RepresentationID\$-\$Number%05d\$.m4s -seg_duration 2 -adaptation_sets "id=0,streams=v id=1,streams=a" ../ffout/dash/stream.mpd
scripts.dash:cmaf:win: shx rm -rf ../ffout/dash && shx mkdir -p ../ffout/dash && ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -map 0:v -map 0:a -c:v libx264 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -b:v 4000k -maxrate 4000k -bufsize 8000k -c:a aac -b:a 128k -f dash -use_template 1 -use_timeline 0 -init_seg_name init-$RepresentationID$.mp4 -media_seg_name chunk-$RepresentationID$-$Number%%05d$.m4s -seg_duration 2 -adaptation_sets "id=0,streams=v id=1,streams=a" ../ffout/dash/stream.mpd
scripts.media:publish:mp4: shx mkdir -p public/media && shx cp ../ffout/output.mp4 public/media/output.mp4
scripts.hls:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/hls && shx mkdir -p public/media && shx cp -r ../ffout/hls public/media/hls
scripts.dash:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/dash && shx mkdir -p public/media && shx cp -r ../ffout/dash public/media/dash
scripts.tour:publish: shx mkdir -p public/media/tour && shx cp ../ffout/tour/clip_5s_transcoded.mp4 public/media/tour/
scripts.tour:all: yarn tour:probe && yarn tour:trim && yarn tour:transcode && yarn tour:verify
scripts.rate:crf23: yarn rate:clean && ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -c:v libx264 -crf 23 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -c:a aac -b:a 128k ../ffout/rate/crf23.mp4
scripts.rate:vbr2pass2m: ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -c:v libx264 -b:v 2M -maxrate 2M -bufsize 4M -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -pass 1 -passlogfile ../ffout/rate/ffpass -an -f mp4 ../ffout/rate/_tmp.mp4 && ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -c:v libx264 -b:v 2M -maxrate 2M -bufsize 4M -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -pass 2 -passlogfile ../ffout/rate/ffpass -c:a aac -b:a 128k ../ffout/rate/vbr_2pass_2M.mp4 && shx rm -f ../ffout/rate/_tmp.mp4 ../ffout/rate/ffpass*
scripts.rate:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/{crf,cbr,vbr} && shx mkdir -p public/media/{crf,cbr,vbr} && shx cp ../ffout/rate/crf23.mp4 public/media/crf/ && shx cp ../ffout/rate/cbr_2M.mp4 public/media/cbr/ && shx cp ../ffout/rate/vbr_2pass_2M.mp4 public/media/vbr/
scripts.rate:publish:win: shx rm -rf public/media/crf public/media/cbr public/media/vbr && shx mkdir -p public/media/crf && shx mkdir -p public/media/cbr && shx mkdir -p public/media/vbr && shx cp ../ffout/rate/crf23.mp4 public/media/crf/ && shx cp ../ffout/rate/cbr_2M.mp4 public/media/cbr/ && shx cp ../ffout/rate/vbr_2pass_2M.mp4 public/media/vbr/
scripts.rate:all: yarn rate:crf23 && yarn rate:cbr2m && yarn rate:vbr2pass2m && yarn rate:verify
scripts.rate:probe: shx ls -lh ../ffout/rate && ffprobe -hide_banner -show_entries format=bit_rate -of json ../ffout/rate/crf23.mp4 && ffprobe -hide_banner -show_entries format=bit_rate -of json ../ffout/rate/cbr_2M.mp4 && ffprobe -hide_banner -show_entries format=bit_rate -of json ../ffout/rate/vbr_2pass_2M.mp4
scripts.rate:probe:all: yarn probe:sample && yarn probe:output && yarn rate:probe
scripts.ladder:p240: ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -vf scale=-2:426  -c:v libx264 -crf 23 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -c:a aac -b:a 128k ../ffout/ladder/p240.mp4
scripts.ladder:p360: ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -vf scale=-2:640  -c:v libx264 -crf 23 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -c:a aac -b:a 128k ../ffout/ladder/p360.mp4
scripts.ladder:p480: ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -vf scale=-2:854  -c:v libx264 -crf 23 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -c:a aac -b:a 128k ../ffout/ladder/p480.mp4
scripts.ladder:p720: ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -vf scale=-2:1280 -c:v libx264 -crf 23 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -c:a aac -b:a 128k ../ffout/ladder/p720.mp4
scripts.ladder:p1080: ffmpeg -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -vf scale=-2:1920 -c:v libx264 -crf 23 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -c:a aac -b:a 128k ../ffout/ladder/p1080.mp4
scripts.ladder:verify: ls -lh ../ffout/ladder/*.mp4 && ffprobe -v error -select_streams v:0 -show_entries stream=width,height -of csv=p=0 ../ffout/ladder/*.mp4
scripts.ladder:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/ladder && shx mkdir -p public/media/ladder && shx cp ../ffout/ladder/*.mp4 public/media/ladder/
scripts.ladder:all: yarn ladder:clean && yarn ladder:p240 && yarn ladder:p360 && yarn ladder:p480 && yarn ladder:p720 && yarn ladder:p1080 && yarn ladder:verify
scripts.presets:verify: ls -lh ../ffout/presets/*.mp4 && ffprobe -hide_banner -show_entries format=bit_rate -of json ../ffout/presets/ultrafast.mp4 && ffprobe -hide_banner -show_entries format=bit_rate -of json ../ffout/presets/slow.mp4
scripts.presets:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/presets && shx mkdir -p public/media/presets && shx cp ../ffout/presets/*.mp4 public/media/presets/
scripts.presets:all: yarn presets:clean && yarn presets:ultrafast && yarn presets:slow && yarn presets:verify
scripts.codecs:hevc5s: ffmpeg -hide_banner -y -ss 0 -t 5 -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -c:v libx265 -crf 28 -preset medium -g 60 -x265-params keyint=60:min-keyint=60:scenecut=0 -tag:v hvc1 -c:a aac -b:a 128k ../ffout/codecs/hevc_5s.mp4
scripts.codecs:verify: ls -lh ../ffout/codecs/*.mp4 && ffprobe -hide_banner -show_entries format=duration -of json ../ffout/codecs/hevc_5s.mp4 && ffprobe -hide_banner -show_entries stream=codec_name -of json ../ffout/codecs/hevc_5s.mp4 && ffprobe -hide_banner -show_entries stream=codec_name -of json ../ffout/codecs/av1_5s.mp4
scripts.codecs:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/codecs && shx mkdir -p public/media/codecs && shx cp ../ffout/codecs/*.mp4 public/media/codecs/
scripts.codecs:all: yarn codecs:clean && yarn codecs:hevc5s && yarn codecs:av15s && yarn codecs:verify
scripts.codecs:probe: yarn codecs:probe:duration && yarn codecs:probe:hevc && yarn codecs:probe:av1
scripts.audio:mp4: ffmpeg -hide_banner -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -an -vn -f lavfi -i anullsrc=channel_layout=stereo:sample_rate=48000 -shortest ../ffout/audio/blank.mp4 && ffmpeg -hide_banner -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -vn -c:a aac -b:a 128k -map a ../ffout/audio/sample_aac128.mp4
scripts.audio:verify: ls -lh ../ffout/audio/* && ffprobe -hide_banner -show_entries stream=codec_name,channels,bit_rate -of json ../ffout/audio/sample_aac128.m4a && ffprobe -hide_banner -show_entries stream=codec_name,channels,bit_rate -of json ../ffout/audio/sample_aac128.mp4
scripts.audio:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/audio && shx mkdir -p public/media/audio && shx cp ../ffout/audio/*.m4a public/media/audio/ && shx cp ../ffout/audio/*.mp4 public/media/audio/
scripts.audio:all: yarn audio:clean && yarn audio:m4a && yarn audio:mp4 && yarn audio:verify
scripts.hls:sp:verify: shx ls -lh ../ffout/hls_sp && shx ls -lh ../ffout/hls_sp/audio/*.m4s | wc -l && shx ls -lh ../ffout/hls_sp/video/*.m4s | wc -l && shx head -n 20 ../ffout/hls_sp/master.m3u8
scripts.hls:sp:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/hls_sp && shx mkdir -p public/media/hls_sp && shx cp -r ../ffout/hls_sp/* public/media/hls_sp/
scripts.dash:sp:verify: shx ls -lh ../ffout/dash_sp && shx ls -lh ../ffout/dash_sp/audio/*.m4s | wc -l && shx ls -lh ../ffout/dash_sp/video/*.m4s | wc -l && shx head -n 40 ../ffout/dash_sp/stream.mpd
scripts.dash:sp:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/dash_sp && shx mkdir -p public/media/dash_sp && shx cp -r ../ffout/dash_sp/* public/media/dash_sp/
scripts.thumbs:vtt:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/thumbs_vtt && shx mkdir -p public/media/thumbs_vtt && shx cp ../ffout/thumbs_vtt/* public/media/thumbs_vtt/
scripts.captions:sample:
node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('../ffout/captions/en.vtt','WEBVTT

00:00:00.000 --> 00:00:02.000
Hello world.

00:00:02.000 --> 00:00:05.000
This is a caption demo.
')"
scripts.captions:from-srt: shx test -f public/assets/captions/en.srt && ffmpeg -hide_banner -y -i public/assets/captions/en.srt ../ffout/captions/en.vtt || echo 'Place SRT at public/assets/captions/en.srt'
scripts.captions:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/captions && shx mkdir -p public/media/captions && shx cp ../ffout/captions/*.vtt public/media/captions/
scripts.dash:subs:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/dash_subs && shx mkdir -p public/media/dash_subs && shx cp -r ../ffout/dash_subs/* public/media/dash_subs/
scripts.captions:burnin: shx mkdir -p ../ffout/captions && shx test -f public/assets/captions/en.srt && ffmpeg -hide_banner -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -vf "subtitles=public/assets/captions/en.srt" -c:v libx264 -preset veryfast -g 60 -keyint_min 60 -sc_threshold 0 -c:a aac -b:a 128k ../ffout/captions/out_burnin.mp4 || echo 'Place SRT at public/assets/captions/en.srt'
scripts.captions:embed: shx mkdir -p ../ffout/captions && shx test -f public/assets/captions/en.srt && ffmpeg -hide_banner -y -i public/assets/sample.mp4 -i public/assets/captions/en.srt -c:v copy -c:a copy -c:s mov_text -metadata:s:s:0 language=en ../ffout/captions/out_tx3g.mp4 || echo 'Place SRT at public/assets/captions/en.srt'
scripts.captions:publish:mp4: shx rm -rf public/media/captions && shx mkdir -p public/media/captions && shx cp ../ffout/captions/out_*.mp4 public/media/captions/ || true
scripts.captions:all:mp4: yarn captions:burnin && yarn captions:embed && yarn captions:verify:burnin && yarn captions:verify:embed && yarn captions:publish:mp4
scripts.hls:subs:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/hls_subs && shx mkdir -p public/media/hls_subs && shx cp -r ../ffout/hls_subs/* public/media/hls_subs/
scripts.hls:dur:verify: shx ls -1 ../ffout/hls2s/video/*.m4s | wc -l && shx ls -1 ../ffout/hls6s/video/*.m4s | wc -l && shx head -n 20 ../ffout/hls2s/master.m3u8 && shx head -n 20 ../ffout/hls6s/master.m3u8
scripts.hls:dur:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/hls2s public/media/hls6s && shx mkdir -p public/media && shx cp -r ../ffout/hls2s public/media/hls2s && shx cp -r ../ffout/hls6s public/media/hls6s
scripts.lint:hls:tags: shx grep -n "^#EXTM3U" public/media/hls_sp/master.m3u8 && shx grep -n "#EXT-X-VERSION" public/media/hls_sp/master.m3u8 && shx grep -n "#EXT-X-MEDIA" public/media/hls_sp/master.m3u8 || true && shx grep -n "#EXT-X-STREAM-INF" public/media/hls_sp/master.m3u8 || true
scripts.lint:dash:tags: shx grep -n "<AdaptationSet" public/media/dash_sp/stream.mpd && shx grep -n "<Representation" public/media/dash_sp/stream.mpd && shx grep -n "SegmentTemplate" public/media/dash_sp/stream.mpd
scripts.dash:sp:bundle: shx rm -f ../ffout/dash_sp_bundle.zip && (cd public/media && shx zip -r ../../ffout/dash_sp_bundle.zip dash_sp)
scripts.eme:probe:
shx mkdir -p public/eme && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const html=`EME Probe

EME Probe

Checking…
`;fs.writeFileSync('public/eme/index.html',html);console.log('Wrote public/eme/index.html');"
scripts.ck:package: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const k=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('../ffout/ck/keys.json'));if(!k.kid_hex||!k.key_hex)throw new Error('missing keys');process.exit(0)" && packager input=../ffout/output.mp4,stream=video,output=../ffout/ck/video_encrypted.mp4 input=../ffout/audio/sample_aac128.m4a,stream=audio,output=../ffout/ck/audio_encrypted.m4a --enable_raw_key --keys label=:key_id=$(node -e "console.log(require('fs').readFileSync('../ffout/ck/keys.json','utf8').match(/\"kid_hex\":\s*\"([0-9a-f]+)\"/)[1])"),key=$(node -e "console.log(require('fs').readFileSync('../ffout/ck/keys.json','utf8').match(/\"key_hex\":\s*\"([0-9a-f]+)\"/)[1])") --protection_scheme cenc --clear_lead 0 --segment_duration 2 --mpd_output ../ffout/ck/stream.mpd
scripts.ck:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/ck && shx mkdir -p public/media/ck && shx cp -r ../ffout/ck/* public/media/ck/
scripts.ck:page:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const k=require('../ffout/ck/keys.json');const html=`ClearKey Demo

ClearKey Demo

Loads /media/ck/stream.mpd with org.w3.clearkey

`;fs.mkdirSync('public/ck',{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync('public/ck/index.html',html);console.log('Wrote public/ck/index.html');"
scripts.ck:verify: shx ls -lh ../ffout/ck && shx head -n 30 ../ffout/ck/stream.mpd && shx cat ../ffout/ck/keys.json
scripts.ck:all: yarn ck:clean && yarn ck:gen && yarn ck:package && yarn ck:publish && yarn ck:page
scripts.drm:keygen: yarn drm:clean && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const c=require('crypto');const b=c.randomBytes(16);const k=c.randomBytes(16);const hex=x=>Buffer.from(x).toString('hex');const b64=x=>Buffer.from(x).toString('base64');const toUUID=h=>[h.slice(0,8),h.slice(8,12),h.slice(12,16),h.slice(16,20),h.slice(20)].join('-');const kid_hex=hex(b), key_hex=hex(k);const out={kid_hex,key_hex,kid_b64:b64(b),key_b64:b64(k),kid_uuid:toUUID(kid_hex),created:new Date().toISOString()};fs.writeFileSync('../ffout/drm/keys.json',JSON.stringify(out,null,2));console.log(out);"
scripts.drm:keyverify: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const d=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('../ffout/drm/keys.json','utf8'));const okHex=s=>/^[0-9a-f]{32}$/.test(s);const okB64=s=>/^[A-Za-z0-9+/=]+$/.test(s);const okUUID=s=>/^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/.test(s);if(!okHex(d.kid_hex)||!okHex(d.key_hex)||!okB64(d.kid_b64)||!okB64(d.key_b64)||!okUUID(d.kid_uuid))process.exit(1);console.log('OK: keys look valid');"
scripts.pssh:package: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('../ffout/drm/keys.json','utf8'));if(!j.kid_hex||!j.key_hex)throw new Error('Run yarn drm:keygen first');" && packager input=../ffout/output.mp4,stream=video,init_segment=../ffout/pssh/video/init.mp4,segment_template=../ffout/pssh/video/chunk_$Number$.m4s input=../ffout/audio/sample_aac128.m4a,stream=audio,init_segment=../ffout/pssh/audio/init.mp4,segment_template=../ffout/pssh/audio/chunk_$Number$.m4s --enable_raw_key --keys label=:key_id=$(node -e "console.log(JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('../ffout/drm/keys.json')).kid_hex)"),key=$(node -e "console.log(JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('../ffout/drm/keys.json')).key_hex)") --protection_scheme cenc --protection_systems Widevine,PlayReady,ClearKey --mpd_output ../ffout/pssh/stream.mpd --segment_duration 2 --fragment_duration 2
scripts.pssh:inspect: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const mpd=fs.readFileSync('../ffout/pssh/stream.mpd','utf8');const p=[...mpd.matchAll(/<cenc:pssh>([A-Za-z0-9+/=]+)<\/cenc:pssh>/g)].map(m=>m[1]);const hex=b=>Buffer.from(b,'base64').toString('hex');const toUUID=h=>[h.slice(0,8),h.slice(8,12),h.slice(12,16),h.slice(16,20),h.slice(20)].join('-');const map={'edef8ba979d64acea3c827dcd51d21ed':'Widevine','9a04f07998404286ab92e65be0885f95':'PlayReady','e2719d58a985b3c9781ab030af78d30e':'ClearKey'};if(p.length===0){console.error('No PSSH found');process.exit(1);}p.forEach((b64,i)=>{const h=hex(b64);/* v1 pssh: box header(8) + size fields; SystemID at offset 32 hex (16 bytes -> 32 hex chars) for many files; try both 16 and 32 offsets */ const cand=[32,24,40].map(off=>h.slice(off,off+32));let found=cand.find(x=>map[x]);console.log(`PSSH[${i}] SystemID: ${toUUID(found||cand[0])} ${found?`(${map[found]})`:''}`);});"
scripts.pssh:mpd:head: shx head -n 60 ../ffout/pssh/stream.mpd
scripts.drm:flow:ckpage:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path='../ffout/ck/keys.json';if(!fs.existsSync(path))throw new Error('Run yarn ck:all first');const k=require(path);const b64url=s=>s.replace(/\+/g,'-').replace(/\//g,'_').replace(/=+$/,'');const kid=b64url(k.kid_b64);const key=b64url(k.key_b64);const html=`License Flow (ClearKey local)

License Flow — Requester ↔ Server (Local ClearKey)

Logs:\n
`;fs.mkdirSync('public/ck-license',{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync('public/ck-license/index.html',html);console.log('Wrote public/ck-license/index.html');"
scripts.wv:package: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const k=require('../ffout/drm/keys.json');if(!k.kid_hex||!k.key_hex)throw new Error('Run yarn drm:keygen first');" && packager input=../ffout/output.mp4,stream=video,init_segment=../ffout/wv/video/init.mp4,segment_template=../ffout/wv/video/chunk_$Number$.m4s input=../ffout/audio/sample_aac128.m4a,stream=audio,init_segment=../ffout/wv/audio/init.mp4,segment_template=../ffout/wv/audio/chunk_$Number$.m4s --enable_raw_key --keys label=:key_id=$(node -e "console.log(JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('../ffout/drm/keys.json')).kid_hex)"),key=$(node -e "console.log(JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('../ffout/drm/keys.json')).key_hex)") --protection_scheme cenc --protection_systems Widevine --segment_duration 2 --fragment_duration 2 --mpd_output ../ffout/wv/stream.mpd
scripts.wv:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/wv && shx mkdir -p public/media/wv && shx cp -r ../ffout/wv/* public/media/wv/
scripts.wv:page:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const html=`Widevine CWIP Demo

Widevine CWIP — Dev License Test

Edit WV_LICENSE_URL below to your dev endpoint.

`;fs.mkdirSync('public/wv',{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync('public/wv/index.html',html);console.log('Wrote public/wv/index.html');"
scripts.wv:verify: shx ls -lh ../ffout/wv && shx grep -n "cenc:pssh" ../ffout/wv/stream.mpd || echo 'No PSSH printed (check MPD)'
scripts.pssh:publish: shx rm -rf public/media/pssh && shx mkdir -p public/media/pssh && shx cp -r ../ffout/pssh/* public/media/pssh/
scripts.dashlic:page:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const html=`DASH License URL Test

DASH — setProtectionData

Edit WV_LICENSE_URL and PR_LICENSE_URL and optional headers below.

`;fs.mkdirSync('public/dash-lic',{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync('public/dash-lic/index.html',html);console.log('Wrote public/dash-lic/index.html');"
scripts.dashlic:verify: shx ls -lh public/media/pssh && shx grep -n "cenc:pssh" public/media/pssh/stream.mpd || echo 'Check that pssh:publish ran; MPD missing PSSH?'
scripts.err:ck:breakkey: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const j=require('../ffout/ck/keys.json');if(!j.key_b64)throw new Error('Run yarn ck:all first');const b=Buffer.from(j.key_b64,'base64');b[0]^=0xff;j.key_b64=b.toString('base64');fs.writeFileSync('../ffout/ck/keys_bad.json',JSON.stringify(j,null,2));console.log('Wrote ../ffout/ck/keys_bad.json');"
scripts.err:ck:page:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const k=require('../ffout/ck/keys_bad.json');const html=`CK Decrypt Error Demo

ClearKey — Broken Key (Expect DECRYPT error)

`;fs.mkdirSync('public/ck-bad',{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync('public/ck-bad/index.html',html);console.log('Wrote public/ck-bad/index.html');"
scripts.err:wv:page:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const html=`WV License Error Demo

Widevine — Bad License URL (Expect LICENSE/NETWORK error)

`;fs.mkdirSync('public/wv-bad',{recursive:true});fs.writeFileSync('public/wv-bad/index.html',html);console.log('Wrote public/wv-bad/index.html');"
scripts.s3:mk: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process');const b=process.env.S3_BUCKET;const r=process.env.AWS_REGION||'us-east-1';if(!b)throw new Error('S3_BUCKET env required');const create = r==='us-east-1' ? `aws s3api create-bucket --bucket ${b}` : `aws s3api create-bucket --bucket ${b} --create-bucket-configuration LocationConstraint=${r}`;execSync(create,{stdio:'inherit'});execSync(`aws s3api put-bucket-ownership-controls --bucket ${b} --ownership-controls '{\"Rules\":[{\"ObjectOwnership\":\"BucketOwnerEnforced\"}]}'`,{stdio:'inherit'});execSync(`aws s3api put-public-access-block --bucket ${b} --public-access-block-configuration BlockPublicAcls=false,IgnorePublicAcls=false,BlockPublicPolicy=false,RestrictPublicBuckets=false`,{stdio:'inherit'});console.log('Bucket created:',b,'region:',r);"
scripts.s3:policy: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const b=process.env.S3_BUCKET;if(!b)throw new Error('S3_BUCKET env required');const p={Version:'2012-10-17',Statement:[{Sid:'PublicReadGetObject',Effect:'Allow',Principal:'*',Action:['s3:GetObject'],Resource:[`arn:aws:s3:::${b}/*`]}]};fs.writeFileSync('../ffout_s3_policy.json',JSON.stringify(p,null,2));console.log('Policy -> ../ffout_s3_policy.json');" && aws s3api put-bucket-policy --bucket $S3_BUCKET --policy file://../ffout_s3_policy.json
scripts.s3:pages:
shx mkdir -p public && node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.writeFileSync('public/index.html','

S3 website up

');fs.writeFileSync('public/error.html','

Not found

');console.log('Wrote public/index.html and error.html');"
scripts.s3:sync: aws s3 sync public/ s3://$S3_BUCKET/ --delete --cache-control max-age=60
scripts.cf:config: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const r=process.env.AWS_REGION||'us-east-1';const b=process.env.S3_BUCKET; if(!b) throw new Error('S3_BUCKET env required'); const originDomain=(r==='us-east-1')?`${b}.s3-website-us-east-1.amazonaws.com`:`${b}.s3-website-${r}.amazonaws.com`; const caller=String(Date.now()); const ManagedCachingOptimized='658327ea-f89d-4fab-a63d-7e88639e58f6'; const cfg={CallerReference:caller,Comment:`bootcamp default distro ${caller}`,Enabled:true,Origins:{Quantity:1,Items:[{Id:'s3-website-origin',DomainName:originDomain,CustomOriginConfig:{HTTPPort:80,HTTPSPort:443,OriginProtocolPolicy:'http-only',OriginSSLProtocols:{Quantity:3,Items:['TLSv1','TLSv1.1','TLSv1.2']}}}]},DefaultCacheBehavior:{TargetOriginId:'s3-website-origin',ViewerProtocolPolicy:'redirect-to-https',AllowedMethods:{Quantity:2,Items:['GET','HEAD']},Compress:true,CachePolicyId:ManagedCachingOptimized},Aliases:{Quantity:0},PriceClass:'PriceClass_100',HttpVersion:'http2',IsIPV6Enabled:true,DefaultRootObject:'index.html',CustomErrorResponses:{Quantity:1,Items:[{ErrorCode:404,ResponseCode:404,ResponsePagePath:'/error.html'}]}}; fs.mkdirSync('../ffout',{recursive:true}); fs.writeFileSync('../ffout_cf_dist.json',JSON.stringify({DistributionConfig:cfg},null,2)); console.log('Wrote ../ffout_cf_dist.json with origin:',originDomain);"
scripts.cf:mk: aws cloudfront create-distribution --distribution-config file://../ffout_cf_dist.json > ../ffout_cf_create.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('../ffout_cf_create.json','utf8'));const id=j.Distribution.Id;const dom=j.Distribution.DomainName;fs.writeFileSync('../ffout_cf_id.txt',id);fs.writeFileSync('../ffout_cf_domain.txt',dom);console.log('ID',id,'DOMAIN',dom);"
scripts.cf:sig:keys:gen: openssl genrsa -out ../ffout_cf_private_key.pem 2048 && openssl rsa -pubout -in ../ffout_cf_private_key.pem -out ../ffout_cf_public_key.pem && echo 'Wrote ../ffout_cf_private_key.pem and ../ffout_cf_public_key.pem'
scripts.cf:sig:public:create: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const pk=fs.readFileSync('../ffout_cf_public_key.pem','utf8');const tmp='../ffout_cf_pubkey_config.json';const name='bootcamp-pubkey-'+Date.now();fs.writeFileSync(tmp,JSON.stringify({CallerReference:String(Date.now()),Name:name,EncodedKey:pk,Comment:'Bootcamp demo'},null,2));" && aws cloudfront create-public-key --public-key-config file://../ffout_cf_pubkey_config.json > ../ffout_cf_pubkey_out.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('../ffout_cf_pubkey_out.json','utf8'));fs.writeFileSync('../ffout_cf_pubkey_id.txt',j.PublicKey.Id);console.log('PublicKeyId',j.PublicKey.Id);"
scripts.cf:sig:keygroup:create: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const id=fs.readFileSync('../ffout_cf_pubkey_id.txt','utf8').trim();const cfg={Name:'bootcamp-kg-'+Date.now(),Items:[id],Comment:'Bootcamp key group'};fs.writeFileSync('../ffout_cf_keygroup_config.json',JSON.stringify({KeyGroupConfig:cfg},null,2));" && aws cloudfront create-key-group --key-group-config file://../ffout_cf_keygroup_config.json > ../ffout_cf_keygroup_out.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('../ffout_cf_keygroup_out.json','utf8'));fs.writeFileSync('../ffout_cf_keygroup_id.txt',j.KeyGroup.Id);console.log('KeyGroupId',j.KeyGroup.Id);"
scripts.cf:restrict:on: aws cloudfront get-distribution-config --id $(cat ../ffout_cf_id.txt) > ../ffout_cf_get.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('../ffout_cf_get.json','utf8'));const kg=fs.readFileSync('../ffout_cf_keygroup_id.txt','utf8').trim();const c=j.DistributionConfig;c.DefaultCacheBehavior.TrustedKeyGroups={Enabled:true,Quantity:1,Items:[kg]};c.DefaultCacheBehavior.TrustedSigners={Enabled:false,Quantity:0};fs.writeFileSync('../ffout_cf_update.json',JSON.stringify(c,null,2));fs.writeFileSync('../ffout_cf_etag.txt',j.ETag);" && aws cloudfront update-distribution --id $(cat ../ffout_cf_id.txt) --if-match $(cat ../ffout_cf_etag.txt) --distribution-config file://../ffout_cf_update.json > /dev/null && echo 'Default behavior now requires signed URLs'
scripts.cf:restrict:off: aws cloudfront get-distribution-config --id $(cat ../ffout_cf_id.txt) > ../ffout_cf_get.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('../ffout_cf_get.json','utf8'));const c=j.DistributionConfig;c.DefaultCacheBehavior.TrustedKeyGroups={Enabled:false,Quantity:0};c.DefaultCacheBehavior.TrustedSigners={Enabled:false,Quantity:0};fs.writeFileSync('../ffout_cf_update.json',JSON.stringify(c,null,2));fs.writeFileSync('../ffout_cf_etag.txt',j.ETag);" && aws cloudfront update-distribution --id $(cat ../ffout_cf_id.txt) --if-match $(cat ../ffout_cf_etag.txt) --distribution-config file://../ffout_cf_update.json > /dev/null && echo 'Signed URL requirement disabled'
scripts.cf:sign:url: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=process.env.CF_PATH||'/index.html';const ttl=Number(process.env.CF_TTL||300);const domain=fs.readFileSync('../ffout_cf_domain.txt','utf8').trim();const kid=fs.readFileSync('../ffout_cf_pubkey_id.txt','utf8').trim();const priv=fs.readFileSync('../ffout_cf_private_key.pem','utf8');const url=`https://${domain}${path}`;const exp=Math.floor(Date.now()/1000)+ttl;const policy=`{\"Statement\":[{\"Resource\":\"${url}\",\"Condition\":{\"DateLessThan\":{\"AWS:EpochTime\":${exp}}}}]}`;const crypto=require('crypto');const sig=crypto.createSign('RSA-SHA1').update(policy).sign(priv);const b64=sig.toString('base64').replace(/\+/g,'-').replace(/\//g,'_').replace(/=+$/g,'~');const signed=`${url}?Expires=${exp}&Signature=${b64}&Key-Pair-Id=${kid}`;process.stdout.write(signed)"
scripts.s3:presign:put: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process');const b=process.env.S3_BUCKET;const r=process.env.AWS_REGION||'us-east-1';const k=process.env.CF_UPLOAD_KEY||'uploads/sample.mp4';const ttl=process.env.CF_TTL||300; if(!b) throw new Error('S3_BUCKET env required'); const cmd=`aws s3api generate-presigned-url --region ${r} --bucket ${b} --key ${k} --expires-in ${ttl} --http-method PUT`; const url=execSync(cmd).toString().trim(); require('fs').writeFileSync('../ffout_s3_put_url.txt',url); console.log(url);"
scripts.s3:put:sample: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const url=fs.readFileSync('../ffout_s3_put_url.txt','utf8').trim(); if(!url) throw new Error('Run yarn s3:presign:put first'); console.log(url);" && curl -v -H "Content-Type: video/mp4" -T public/assets/sample.mp4 "$(cat ../ffout_s3_put_url.txt)"
